modules.purpose: Owns process step 1: Resolve configuration snapshot.

process_bindings.validation: Schema validate; stable ordering; hash snapshot
process_bindings.failure: Reject invalid config; continue using last known good snapshot

invariants: Schema validate; stable ordering; hash snapshot

notes: Reject invalid config; continue using last known good snapshot

modules.purpose: Owns process step 2: Emit schedule tick (calendar polling cadence).

process_bindings.validation: Frozen-time mode supported for tests
process_bindings.failure: If scheduler stalls, emit HealthReport alert and pause polling

invariants: Frozen-time mode supported for tests

notes: If scheduler stalls, emit HealthReport alert and pause polling

modules.purpose: Owns process step 3: Poll calendar source(s).

process_bindings.validation: HTTP 200; payload parsable; source_event_id present
process_bindings.failure: Retry w/ deterministic backoff; on persistent failure emit IngestError and skip cycle

invariants: HTTP 200; payload parsable; source_event_id present

notes: Retry w/ deterministic backoff; on persistent failure emit IngestError and skip cycle

modules.purpose: Owns process step 4: Normalize raw calendar entries.

process_bindings.output_contract: CalendarEvent (UTC timestamps, standardized impact, dedup keys)
process_bindings.validation: UTC conversion success; impact in enum; dedup policy applied
process_bindings.failure: Emit NormalizationError for malformed rows; continue with valid CalendarEvent

invariants: UTC conversion success; impact in enum; dedup policy applied

notes: Emit NormalizationError for malformed rows; continue with valid CalendarEvent

modules.purpose: Owns process step 5: Persist calendar events (append-only).

process_bindings.validation: Idempotent by message_id; ordered by created_utc + tie-breaker
process_bindings.failure: Rollback and retry once; on persistent failure halt calendar pipeline

invariants: Idempotent by message_id; ordered by created_utc + tie-breaker

notes: Rollback and retry once; on persistent failure halt calendar pipeline

modules.purpose: Owns process step 6: Build anticipation triggers from calendar.

process_bindings.validation: No duplicate trigger for event+offset; TTL rules applied
process_bindings.failure: Default to conservative suppression metadata; emit error event

invariants: No duplicate trigger for event+offset; TTL rules applied

notes: Default to conservative suppression metadata; emit error event

modules.purpose: Owns process step 7: Ingest market ticks.

process_bindings.validation: Timestamp freshness; symbol normalization; reject malformed
process_bindings.failure: Emit IngestError; skip malformed ticks

invariants: Timestamp freshness; symbol normalization; reject malformed

notes: Emit IngestError; skip malformed ticks

modules.purpose: Owns process step 8: Aggregate ticks into bars.

process_bindings.validation: Deterministic bar boundaries; tie-breaker rules
process_bindings.failure: Drop out-of-order ticks per policy; emit error event

invariants: Deterministic bar boundaries; tie-breaker rules

notes: Drop out-of-order ticks per policy; emit error event

modules.purpose: Owns process step 9: Compute indicators.

process_bindings.validation: Deterministic rounding; indicator params pinned by config snapshot
process_bindings.failure: Emit indicator error; do not output partial snapshots unless flagged

invariants: Deterministic rounding; indicator params pinned by config snapshot

notes: Emit indicator error; do not output partial snapshots unless flagged

modules.purpose: Owns process step 10: Assemble strategy feature frame.

process_bindings.validation: Exact declared feature set; stable ordering
process_bindings.failure: Emit packaging error; do not emit FeatureFrame

invariants: Exact declared feature set; stable ordering

notes: Emit packaging error; do not emit FeatureFrame

modules.purpose: Owns process step 11: Generate signal (or suppression).

process_bindings.validation: Suppression reasons enumerated; no sizing/broker specifics
process_bindings.failure: On internal error, emit SignalSuppressed with deterministic reason code

invariants: Suppression reasons enumerated; no sizing/broker specifics

notes: On internal error, emit SignalSuppressed with deterministic reason code

modules.purpose: Owns process step 12: Convert signal to trade intent.

process_bindings.validation: Stable correlation_id from Signal; constraints + rationale attached
process_bindings.failure: Reject intent; emit error event

invariants: Stable correlation_id from Signal; constraints + rationale attached

notes: Reject intent; emit error event

modules.purpose: Owns process step 13: Evaluate risk and size.

process_bindings.validation: Idempotent for same inputs; deterministic sizing + rounding
process_bindings.failure: On rule engine failure default to REJECT with SAFETY_FAIL reason

invariants: Idempotent for same inputs; deterministic sizing + rounding

notes: On rule engine failure default to REJECT with SAFETY_FAIL reason

modules.purpose: Owns process step 14: Compile order intent.

process_bindings.validation: client_order_id + idempotency_key assigned per policy
process_bindings.failure: If compilation fails, emit error; do not proceed to routing

invariants: client_order_id + idempotency_key assigned per policy

notes: If compilation fails, emit error; do not proceed to routing

modules.purpose: Owns process step 15: Route order to broker.

process_bindings.validation: Routing deterministic; preserves OrderIntent hash
process_bindings.failure: If routing fails, emit error and reject

invariants: Routing deterministic; preserves OrderIntent hash

notes: If routing fails, emit error and reject

modules.purpose: Owns process step 16: Serialize and send to MT4 adapter.
responsibilities: Serialize and send to MT4 adapter

process_bindings.step_name: Serialize and send to MT4 adapter
process_bindings.validation: Atomic write+rename (no partial reads); sequence + hash; idempotent resend
process_bindings.failure: Deterministic retry schedule; on persistent failure emit TransportError and stop

invariants: Atomic write+rename (no partial reads); sequence + hash; idempotent resend

notes: Deterministic retry schedule; on persistent failure emit TransportError and stop

modules.purpose: Owns process step 17: EA executes broker order.

process_bindings.validation: EA contains no strategy/risk logic; only execution
process_bindings.failure: Classify and emit error events; retries per deterministic policy

invariants: EA contains no strategy/risk logic; only execution

notes: Classify and emit error events; retries per deterministic policy

modules.purpose: Owns process step 18: Normalize broker events to canonical reports.
responsibilities: Normalize broker events to canonical reports

process_bindings.step_name: Normalize broker events to canonical reports
process_bindings.validation: Dedup + ordering policy; canonical rounding
process_bindings.failure: Emit NormalizationError; quarantine malformed broker events

invariants: Dedup + ordering policy; canonical rounding

notes: Emit NormalizationError; quarantine malformed broker events

modules.purpose: Owns process step 19: Apply execution reports to OMS state.
responsibilities: Apply execution reports to OMS state

process_bindings.step_name: Apply execution reports to OMS state
process_bindings.validation: Idempotent fills; out-of-order handling per policy; stable final state
process_bindings.failure: On OMS inconsistency, quarantine stream and halt new orders

invariants: Idempotent fills; out-of-order handling per policy; stable final state

notes: On OMS inconsistency, quarantine stream and halt new orders

modules.purpose: Owns process step 20: Classify trade close and compute canonical PnL.
responsibilities: Classify trade close and compute canonical PnL

process_bindings.step_name: Classify trade close and compute canonical PnL
process_bindings.validation: Close reason enum; deterministic PnL rounding rules
process_bindings.failure: If PnL cannot be computed, emit TradeClosed with COMPUTATION_ERROR flag

invariants: Close reason enum; deterministic PnL rounding rules

notes: If PnL cannot be computed, emit TradeClosed with COMPUTATION_ERROR flag

modules.purpose: Owns process step 21: Bucketize outcome.

process_bindings.validation: Only enumerated buckets; stable bucket mapping
process_bindings.failure: If mapping fails, emit UNKNOWN bucket and quarantine for review

invariants: Only enumerated buckets; stable bucket mapping

notes: If mapping fails, emit UNKNOWN bucket and quarantine for review
Reentry matrix v1.0 pre-modular detail: EA-REG/superseded/LEGACY_HUEY_P_TACTICAL_SPEC_pre-modular.txt (superseded by v3.0)

modules.purpose: Owns process step 22: Compute event proximity.

process_bindings.validation: Frozen-time supported; thresholds validated (no overlaps/gaps)
process_bindings.failure: Emit proximity error; default to MOST_CONSERVATIVE proximity bucket

invariants: Frozen-time supported; thresholds validated (no overlaps/gaps)

notes: Emit proximity error; default to MOST_CONSERVATIVE proximity bucket
Reentry matrix v1.0 pre-modular detail: EA-REG/superseded/LEGACY_HUEY_P_TACTICAL_SPEC_pre-modular.txt (superseded by v3.0)

modules.purpose: Owns process step 23: Lookup matrix decision.

process_bindings.validation: Deterministic fallback hierarchy; matrix version pinned
process_bindings.failure: If matrix missing, emit MatrixFallbackUsed + safest MatrixDecision

invariants: Deterministic fallback hierarchy; matrix version pinned

notes: If matrix missing, emit MatrixFallbackUsed + safest MatrixDecision
Reentry matrix v1.0 pre-modular detail: EA-REG/superseded/LEGACY_HUEY_P_TACTICAL_SPEC_pre-modular.txt (superseded by v3.0)

modules.purpose: Owns process step 24: Build reentry trade intent (or suppress).

process_bindings.validation: Hard cap: no reentry beyond R2; no circular chains
process_bindings.failure: Emit ReentrySuppressed with deterministic reason

invariants: Hard cap: no reentry beyond R2; no circular chains

notes: Emit ReentrySuppressed with deterministic reason
Reentry matrix v1.0 pre-modular detail: EA-REG/superseded/LEGACY_HUEY_P_TACTICAL_SPEC_pre-modular.txt (superseded by v3.0)

modules.purpose: Owns process step 25: Loop: reentry intent follows same risk->order->route->transport->execute chain.
responsibilities: Loop: reentry intent follows same risk->order->route->transport->execute chain

process_bindings.step_name: Loop: reentry intent follows same risk->order->route->transport->execute chain
process_bindings.output_contract: Either (a) new RoutedOrderIntent executed, producing new OutcomeBucket, or (b) suppression/cooldown state update
process_bindings.validation: Chain depth < configured max; velocity limits; idempotency keys enforced
process_bindings.failure: On loop prevention trigger, enforce terminal cooldown and stop

invariants: Chain depth < configured max; velocity limits; idempotency keys enforced

notes: On loop prevention trigger, enforce terminal cooldown and stop

modules.purpose: Owns process step 26: Health aggregation + SLO evaluation.

process_bindings.validation: Deterministic thresholds; stable report format
process_bindings.failure: If health is unknown, default to risk-off posture (suppress new intents)

invariants: Deterministic thresholds; stable report format

notes: If health is unknown, default to risk-off posture (suppress new intents)

modules.purpose: Owns cross-cutting shared libraries used across canonical modules.
responsibilities: Provide reusable shared utilities and middleware.
